name: Broccoli/Mushroom Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and cut broccoli into 1/2 inch pieces.
2. Steam in 1/2 cup water until tender/crisp (microwave for 3 to 4 minutes). Do not drain. Set aside.
3. Clean and slice mushrooms.
4. In a large pan over medium heat, melt butter; add flour to make a roux. Cook, stirring constantly, for 2 to 4 minutes. Do not let brown.
5. Stir in chicken broth; bring just to a boil.
6. Turn heat to low. Add broccoli, mushrooms, half-and-half and seasonings. Heat through but do not boil.
7. Makes 8 servings.
